name: Garlic Shrimp with Noodles
recipeIngredient: 1 package Lipton Noodles & Sauce Butter & Herb
1 pound raw medium shrimp, peeled and deveined
1 can (14 oz) artichoke hearts, drained and halved
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium saucepan, melt 2 tablespoons butter and cook onion until tender.
2. Add water and bring to a boil.
3. Stir in Lipton Noodles & Sauce Butter & Herb and continue boiling over medium heat, stirring occasionally, for 8 minutes or until noodles are tender.
4. Meanwhile, heat remaining 2 tablespoons butter with olive oil in a 12-inch skillet over medium high heat.
5. Cook garlic for 30 seconds.
6. Add shrimp and artichokes and cook, stirring occasionally, for 3 minutes or until shrimp are opaque.
7. Stir in parsley and pepper.
8. To serve, combine shrimp mixture with hot noodles.
9. Garnish, if desired, with watercress.
